CreateButton.label: Components
CreateButton.description: An interactive button that runs a custom function when clicked.

arguments.name: callback
arguments.description: Fires when the button is clicked.

CreateColorPicker.label: Components
CreateColorPicker.description: An advanced RGB/HSV color picker that supports hex input and saturation/brightness visual adjustments.

arguments.name: callback
arguments.description: Fires with the selected Color3 object.

CreateDropdown.label: Components
CreateDropdown.description: A selection menu for single or multi-value selections. Supports search filtering inside dropdown items.

arguments.name: callback
arguments.description: Fires with a table of selected options.

arguments.name: list
arguments.description: Array of string options to display.

CreateInput.label: Components
CreateInput.description: A single-line text input field for strings and custom configs.

arguments.name: callback
arguments.description: Fires with the updated text value.

arguments.name: placeholder
arguments.description: Ghost text shown when the input is empty.

CreateKeybind.label: Components
CreateKeybind.description: Allows the user to bind a keybind shortcut to toggle/trigger functions. Click to rebind, press Escape to unbind.

arguments.name: callback
arguments.description: Fires with the new KeyCode when bound/triggered.

CreateLogger.label: Components
CreateLogger.description: An in-app console widget that displays color-coded activity logs. Supports INFO, SUCCESS, WARNING, and ERROR levels.

arguments.name: height
arguments.description: Pixel height of the log area.

CreateLogger.example:
local log = tab:CreateLogger({ text = "Console", height = 280 })

log:Log("INFO",    "Script loaded.")
log:Log("SUCCESS", "ESP enabled.")
log:Log("WARNING", "High ping detected.")
log:Log("ERROR",   "Target not found.")

CreatePlayerList.label: Components
CreatePlayerList.description: Renders a scrolling player list widget showing active players on the server. Supports up to 2 custom buttons per player.

arguments.name: buttons
arguments.description: List of custom player actions (max 2). E.g. {{text='TP', type='button', callback=function(p) ... end}}

arguments.name: height
arguments.description: Pixel height of the scroll area.

arguments.name: text
arguments.description: Header title of the list widget.

CreateSection.label: Layout
CreateSection.description: Inserts a visual section divider with a label to group related components.

CreateSlider.label: Components
CreateSlider.description: A draggable range input with min/max bounds and optional decimal precision.

arguments.name: callback
arguments.description: Fires with the current numeric value.

CreateTargetBody.label: Components
CreateTargetBody.description: A body hitbox selector showing a visual representation of a character body. Perfect for selective aimbot hitboxes.

arguments.name: callback
arguments.description: Fires with a table of currently active body parts.

arguments.name: default
arguments.description: Initially selected body part(s). Valid parts: 'Head', 'Torso', 'LeftArm', 'RightArm', 'LeftLeg', 'RightLeg'.

arguments.name: disabledParts
arguments.description: List of parts that cannot be selected/clicked. Valid parts: 'Head', 'Torso', 'LeftArm', 'RightArm', 'LeftLeg', 'RightLeg'.

CreateToggle.label: Components
CreateToggle.description: A checkbox-style switch for boolean values. State is persisted to config when a flag is provided.

arguments.name: callback
arguments.description: Fires with the new boolean state.

CreateWindow.label: Core API
CreateWindow.description: Creates the main window container. Must be called before creating any tabs or components.

arguments.name: AutoExecUrl
arguments.description: URL of the raw script to download and execute for AutoExec.

arguments.name: ConfigName
arguments.description: Filename key used for config persistence.

arguments.name: DisplayOrder
arguments.description: Render layering display order index of the ScreenGui.

arguments.name: Icon
arguments.description: Lucide icon name shown in the corner.

arguments.name: Name
arguments.description: Name property of the ScreenGui instance.

arguments.name: Position
arguments.description: Initial screen position coordinates of the window.

arguments.name: Title
arguments.description: Window title displayed in the top bar.

CreateWindow.example:
local window = MonoUI.CreateWindow({
    Title      = "mono ui",
    Subtitle   = "premium modular library",
    Size       = UDim2.fromOffset(600, 400),
    Icon       = "shield",
    ConfigName = "my_config",
    AutoSave   = true,
    AutoExec   = true,
})

CreateTab.label: Layout
CreateTab.description: Appends a navigation tab to the window sidebar. Returns a tab object used to add components.

arguments.name: icon
arguments.description: Lucide icon shown next to the label.

Notify.label: Core API
Notify.description: Fires a toast notification at the bottom right corner of the screen.

arguments.name: duration
arguments.description: Time in seconds before the notification disappears.

arguments.name: icon
arguments.description: Lucide icon name displayed beside the text.

SetWatermark.label: Core API
SetWatermark.description: Creates or updates a small top-right HUD showing custom text, client FPS, ping, and character coordinates.

arguments.name: anchorPoint
arguments.description: Anchor point of the watermark frame.

arguments.name: visible
arguments.description: Sets the visibility of the watermark HUD.

CreateControlHUD.label: Core API
CreateControlHUD.description: Creates a floating, draggable, compact HUD with quick toggles (perfect for keeping essential scripts visible).

arguments.name: icon
arguments.description: Lucide icon name for this HUD shortcut.

arguments.name: default
arguments.description: Initial active state of the shortcut button.

AddCleanup.label: Core API
AddCleanup.description: Registers a thread, connection, instance, or custom callback to be automatically cleaned up/cancelled when the window is closed or destroyed.

arguments.name: object
arguments.description: The thread, RBXScriptConnection, Instance, or custom clean-up function to track.

arguments.name: customCleanup
arguments.description: Optional destructor function. For threads, pass task.cancel. For custom actions, pass a function.

AddCleanup.example:
-- Auto-cancel a background loop when window closes
local myLoop = task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        task.wait(1)
        print("Looping...")
    end
end)
window:AddCleanup(myLoop, task.cancel)

-- Auto-disconnect a custom event connection
local connection = game.Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
    print("Welcome", player.Name)
end)
window:AddCleanup(connection)

CreateTimer.label: Core API
CreateTimer.description: Creates a new Timer object from the built-in sleitnick/timer package. Provides a memory-safe, pauseable, and highly accurate alternative to while true do loops.

arguments.name: interval
arguments.description: Tick interval duration in seconds (defaults to 1).

CreateTimer.example:
-- Create a timer that ticks every 1 second
local myTimer = MonoUI.CreateTimer(1)

-- Connect logic to the Tick event
myTimer.Tick:Connect(function()
    print("Timer ticked!")
end)

-- Register the timer with the window to automatically stop it when the GUI closes
window:AddCleanup(myTimer)

-- Start the timer
myTimer:Start()

-- You can also use:
-- myTimer:Pause()
-- myTimer:Resume()
-- myTimer:Stop()

CreateHBar.label: Layout
CreateHBar.description: Creates a horizontal container block (HBar) that can hold multiple vertical column stacks (VBars) side-by-side.

CreateVBar.label: Layout
CreateVBar.description: Creates a vertical column stack (VBar) inside an HBar layout container. Allows vertical stacking of any standard components.
CreateVBar.example:
local vbar1 = hbar:CreateVBar()
vbar1:CreateToggle({ text = "Toggle in VBar" })
